title: peniocereus oaxacensis
intro: Peniocereus oaxacensis, also known as the Mexican evening primrose cactus or Oaxacan torch cactus, is a species of cactus native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Peniocereus oaxacensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin or used internally to promote overall well-being.
